channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: Last chance! The drone we rate as the 'best for beginners' is on sale for a record-low price at Amazon, but not for long
item.description: DJI's 4K Mini is our favorite budget drone for beginners and experienced pilots alike — here's why today's record-low deal at Amazon is so good.

item.title: Why silence is no longer a security strategy
item.description: Why openness and context now define strong, modern cybersecurity practices.

item.title: Free Max : faut-il souscrire au nouveau forfait mobile illimité de Free ?
item.description: Après le sans engagement à prix bas en 2012 et Free Flex en 2021, Free a lancé aujourd'hui sa troisième révolution mobile : le forfait mobile Free Max. Un forfait mobile comme on en a jamais vu pour lequel "illimité" est le maître mot. Faut-il craquer pour autant ?

item.title: Cyberattaques russes contre l’iPhone : de nouveaux pirates exploitent le kit DarkSword
item.description: Un kit d’exploitation iOS ultra-sophistiqué, baptisé DarkSword, vient d'arriver entre les mains d'un nouveau gang de pirates russes. Le groupe russe TA446, alias Callisto, s’en sert à grande échelle dans des faux mails d’invitation.

item.title: Duolingo’s Luis von Ahn Wants to Delete the Blockchain
item.description: This has nothing to do with the crypto he lost the password for.

item.title: Android Auto just got a major EV route planning upgrade — and improvements to autoplay settings have also been spotted
item.description: Android Auto can now make intelligent charging suggestions based on the make and model of your EV.

item.title: Micron planche sur une combine qui tuerait l’approvisionnement en mémoire vive pour nos GPUs
item.description: Micron travaille sur une nouvelle technique d'empilement de mémoire GDDR qui devrait lui permettre une chose : rafler pour l'IA un maximum de modules de mémoire vidéo à usage général... au risque d'accroître encore plus la pénurie de cartes graphiques gaming.

item.title: Les prix des PS5 augmentent trop et très bientôt : voici les dernières offres à saisir pour la console de Sony
item.description: Les prix augmentent partout en ce moment... et ce n'est d'ailleurs pas la première hausse tarifaire pour la PS5. Mais là, ça pique vraiment : la version Standard va passer à 649 euros et la version Digitale à 599 euros. La PS5 Pro et le PS Portal sont également concernés. Il ne vous reste donc que quelques jours pour les obtenir à leurs « anciens » prix, voire même en promotion chez certains marchands. ...

item.title: What quantum technology can learn from AI’s development
item.description: Unlike AI, quantum must embed standards from the start to create an investable market.

item.title: Pourquoi Apple supprime massivement les apps de création d’apps de l’App Store
item.description: Apple fait du ménage sur son App Store et les applications qui permettent de générer des apps par intelligence artificielle sont dans son colimateur. Après avoir bloqué plusieurs mises à jour, il vient de supprimer définitivement l’application Anything de son magasin.

item.title: La « révolution » de Free s’appelle Free Max : le récap des nouveautés du forfait mobile illimité
item.description: Quand Free sort le mot "révolution", on a appris à être prudents. Mais il faut dire que l'opérateur a réussi à surprendre avec son forfait Free Max qui propose une connexion Internet illimitée dans plus de 135 destinations. Revoyez la conférence de l'annonce.

item.title: Decathlon brade son Van Rysel E‑EDR AF : 600 € de remise sur ce vélo électrique haut de gamme qui séduit les cyclistes
item.description: Decathlon propose son Van Rysel E-EDR AF Shimano 105 Di2, un modèle pensé pour allier performance, confort et assistance discrète. Ce vélo devient encore plus intéressant aujourd’hui grâce à une belle remise, le faisant passer à 2 400 euros au lieu de 2 999 euros.

item.title: Pourquoi BYD licencie 100 000 employés dans le monde… alors que ses ventes explosent
item.description: En 2025, BYD a supprimé 100 000 postes à travers le monde. Pourtant, l'entreprise chinoise produit plus de voitures électriques et hybrides qu'avant. En cause : l'arrivée des robots en masse dans les usines, et une guerre des prix féroces qui ne laisse plus la place au superflu.

item.title: AT&T now offers a single subscription for both wireless service and home internet
item.description: AT&T just announced OneConnect, a new service that lets customers sign up for both wireless service and fiber home internet under a single subscription. Pricing starts at $90. This could end up saving some serious bucks, especially for those who are paying around $100 per month for each from separate providers. These plans offer unlimited mobile data, which is great. The home internet speed caps at 1Gbps, which is a decent enough metric. Pricing starts at $90 per month, which includes a single phone line, unlimited data. This plan also covers mobile data for three devices of the user's choosin...

item.title: Free Max : les chiffres qui ont poussé Free à lancer sa « révolution »
item.description: Free a cité plusieurs chiffres intéressants qui permettent de comprendre à qui s'adresse l'offre Free Max avec Internet illimité en France et à l'étranger.

item.title: How CIOs Can Implement AI with Real Financial Intelligence
item.description: Move beyond the hype with deterministic AI architectures designed for transparency, accountability and ROI.

item.title: En ce moment, Bouygues Telecom double le stockage de votre Samsung Galaxy S26 pour le même prix [Sponso]
item.description: Avec ses forfaits Avantages Smartphone, Bouygues Telecom propose des appareils récents à des prix raisonnables, et avec une tonne d’avantages. Exemple avec le Samsung Galaxy S26, son stockage doublé et sa facilité de paiement.

item.title: Voir qui est en ligne sur WhatsApp en un clin d’œil ? C’est pour très bientôt !
item.description: WhatsApp va enfin vous permettre de voir en un coup d'œil quels sont vos contacts en ligne. Une fonctionnalité qui lui manquait cruellement face à la concurrence.

item.title: Artemis 2 by the Numbers: Breaking Down NASA’s Big Return to the Moon
item.description: Sometimes, the best way to understand a mission is to know the numbers.

item.title: Opposing ICE Might Save the Country. It Could Also Ruin Your Life
item.description: For months, lone vibe coder Rafael Concepcion has obsessively built tools to counter the federal immigration crackdown—pivoting as he’s been outmatched. He’s also lost his job and become a target.

item.title: 'Privacy shouldn't be an optional extra, it should be the default for every conversation': Proton unveils security-first alternative to Microsoft 365 and Google Workspace
item.description: Proton is putting its core apps into two Workspace subscriptions to make it easier to manage subscriptions.

item.title: Nvidia-backed ThinkLabs AI raises $28 million to tackle a growing power grid crunch
item.description: ThinkLabs AI, a startup building artificial intelligence models that simulate the behavior of the electric grid, announced today that it has closed a $28 million Series A financing round led by Energy Impact Partners (EIP), one of the largest energy transition investment firms in the world. Nvidia’s venture capital arm NVentures and Edison International, the parent company of Southern California Edison, also participated in the round.The funding marks a significant escalation in the race to apply AI not just to software and content generation, but to the physical infrastructure that powers mod...

item.title: Burnt-out managers are destroying teams. These 5 daily habits reverse it
item.description: Managerial burnout isn’t inevitable. These 5 habits can prevent it. I’ll never forget the morning I froze in front of a client. I was a Vice President at Kearney, the global management consulting firm, presenting our proposal to a three-person client subcommittee. Mid-sentence, my mind went completely blank. Not the normal “lost my train of thought” blank. The kind of blank that leaves a scary emptiness where confidence used to live....

item.title: Your trash can is ugly. Caraway wants to fix that
item.description: It’s the first Caraway product that isn’t about cooking—and it signals something much bigger about where the brand is headed. The modern kitchen has become a canvas for self-expression, a place where consumers obsess over aesthetics and materials with an intensity usually reserved for fashion. They carefully consider the color of their Dutch oven, the kind of wood in their cutting board, and where to display their glass canisters. And yet, tucked into the corner of that same beautiful kitchen, is almost certainly an unattractive trash can that looks like it was designed in 2000 and never revis...

item.title: Apple at 50: The tech giant’s best, worst, and weirdest ideas
item.description: Over five decades, Apple has built some of the most influential tech ever made—and some genuinely strange flops. These are the highs, lows, and oddities. Founded by Steve Jobs and Steve Wozniak, Apple officially incorporated on April 1, 1976. The company helped usher in the era of personal computing, pairing meticulous design with tight hardware–software integration and a simple promise: “It just works.” Its history has been anything but linear. There were early breakthroughs, a near-collapse in the 1990s, and a dramatic revival after Jobs returned, followed by a run of mass-market hits beginn...

item.title: Inside the race to rebrand Cesar Chavez Day
item.description: In California and elsewhere, public officials aim to honor the farmworkers movement rather than the man. Cesar Chavez Day is getting a new name.

item.title: L’européen Proton lance une nouvelle offre pour attaquer frontalement Google et Microsoft
item.description: L'éditeur de ProtonMail accélère encore avec le lancement de Proton Workspace. Une solution plus complète pour s'attaquer à Google et Microsoft.

item.title: Mal des transports : cette app gratuite de Samsung vous soigne en 60 secondes
item.description: Marre d'avoir la nausée dès que vous lisez sur votre smartphone en voiture ? Samsung a peut-être la solution. Avec Samsung Hearapy, le constructeur sud-coréen transforme vos écouteurs en véritable bouclier contre la cinétose. On vous explique comment ça marche.

item.title: I interviewed the CEOs of Reddit, Colgate-Palmolive, and 6 other top companies about leading for the long run. Here’s what they said
item.description: How do you focus on lasting success in an era when the the pressure to show instant results is relentless? “We choose to go to the Moon in this decade and do the other things, not because they are easy, but because they are hard, because that goal will serve to organize and measure the best of our energies and skills.”

item.title: 'AI is accelerating faster than enterprise cloud maturity': Cloud experience is having a major effect on how businesses employ AI
item.description: Many businesses are being held back from realizing AI success because their cloud isn't keeping up.

item.title: iOS 26.5 beta contains bad news for Siri and Apple Maps — but there's a major privacy bonus for iPhone messaging
item.description: iOS 26.5 brings back end-to-end encryption when messaging Android users, but it also brings us one step closer to ads in Apple Maps.

item.title: Galaxy Watch 9 : ça y est, la prochaine montre de Samsung se prépare au lancement
item.description: Attendue pour cet été, la Galaxy Watch 9 de Samsung est déjà apparue sur des serveurs de test du constructeur sud-coréen. De quoi nous rapprocher un peu plus de sa sortie.

item.title: Complet jusqu’en 2028 : comment la pénurie de RAM pourrait profiter à Samsung face à TSMC
item.description: Duellistes sur le terrain des nodes les plus avancés, TSMC et Samsung Foundry n'ont pas toujours joué à armes égales ces dernières années. La saturation, jusqu'en 2028, des capacités de production du leader taïwanais des semi-conducteurs pourrait toutefois jouer en la faveur de son rival coréen.

item.title: Best hardware options for deploying OpenClaw
item.description: From Mac Mini M4 to cloud VPS and edge AI hardware, these are the six deployment options worth considering for hosting your OpenClaw AI agent.

item.title: Bouygues Telecom augmente ses tarifs BBox mais une surprise attend votre téléviseur
item.description: L'opérateur lance une refonte majeure de ses abonnements internet. Si la facture s'alourdit pour les abonnés, cette hausse tarifaire s'accompagne d'une montée en gamme technologique avec plus de Wi-Fi 7 et une toute nouvelle approche de la télévision par application.

item.title: Apple Removes iPhone Vibe Coding App from App Store
item.description: Vibe coding apps reportedly keep running afoul of an App Store guideline called "Guideline 2.5.2."

item.title: « Pas besoin d’attendre » : cet expert explique pourquoi la révolution de la batterie solide n’aura pas lieu (tout de suite) dans les voitures électriques
item.description: La batterie solide, promise comme la prochaine révolution des voitures électriques, restera encore extrêmement minoritaire dans les cinq à dix prochaines années, d'après un expert sur le sujet.

item.title: I asked James Cameron what to stream after new nature documentary Secrets of the Bees — and his answer proves why he's a cinematic genius
item.description: Avatar and Titanic director James Cameron has produced a brand-new NatGeo documentary — and if you're looking for a double bill binge, he's got the perfect recommendation.

item.title: A new Supergirl trailer will be released today — and some fresh cast and plot details about the DCU movie have excited and confused me
item.description: Supergirl's next trailer will take flight imminently — and its preview teaser already has fans delighted over one specific cameo.

item.title: March Madness fatigue: Why some office workers hate ‘sportsball’
item.description: Your colleagues might be sick of hearing about brackets and office pools. Here’s how leaders can maintain an inclusive culture. March Madness is well underway, but for a lot of people, it’s just another day at the office. That is, until you walk into the break room or sign into Slack and realize the place is abuzz with bracket chatter and Final Four predictions. ...

item.title: Stop thinking about work earlier today to be more productive tomorrow
item.description: But that’s not always possible in the age of remote work and always-on expectations. Your performance at work today has a lot to do with how you spent your time after work yesterday.

item.title: How to watch 28 Years Later: The Bone Temple: Now streaming
item.description: Find out how to watch '28 Years Later: The Bone Temple' at home, including streaming details and the best Netflix deals.

item.title: ‘Raising the bar for mobile photography’ — Vivo launches the X300 Ultra and its eye-popping 400mm telephoto attachment
item.description: The Vivo X300 Ultra phone has launched in China alongside its 400mm telephoto lens attachment.

item.title: Score the Magic: The Gathering Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles Pre-Release Pack for its best-ever price at Amazon
item.description: Amazon has the MTG Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles Pre-Release Pack for $32.01, while Walmart has it lower at $31.99.

item.title: Google Wallet : l’interface de vos cartes pourrait bientôt ressembler à ça
item.description: Google Wallet s’apprête peut-être à transformer l’apparence de vos cartes de fidélité et billets de train, pour mieux afficher les informations essentielles.

item.title: How to watch Scream 7: When the new Ghostface movie hits streaming
item.description: Neve Campbell, Matthew Lillard, and more return in 'Scream 7.' Find out how to stream it at home with this how to watch guide.

item.title: These 40 Amazon Spring Sale Tech Deals Are Actually Good. We Checked the Price History (2026)
item.description: This sale ends tonight, and it’s full of fake “deals.” We hunted to find truly good prices on gear we’ve tested.

item.title: China’s Biggest Social Media Celebrity Is… Kris Jenner?
item.description: RedNote users have been changing their profile pics and "praying" to the reality TV icon with the hopes of manifesting fame and fortune.

item.title: Airbnb is introducing a private car pick-up service
item.description: Airbnb is partnering with transportation company Welcome Pickups to let users book a private car service during their trip.

item.title: What will the robot jobs apocalypse look like? Ask Amazon warehouse workers
item.description: Think a robot can’t do your job? ‘It will happen, but I don’t know when,’ says one expert. How robots are already upending blue-collar work, career advancement, worker rights, and job satisfaction. Across the top floors of an Amazon warehouse in Garner, North Carolina, about 10 miles south of Raleigh, the robots are already crowding out human workers. ...

item.title: One company’s obsessive, decade-long quest to make American cheese that’s actually cheese
item.description: A secret R&D lab, countless grilled cheese sandwiches, the perfect cheese pull: the untold story of how Sargento defied the odds—and beat Kraft—to improve on the American classic. Bad, yet still pretty good, American cheese refuses to expire—and not just because of all the preservatives.

item.title: 4 AI chatbots tried to fact-check Rubio on Iran. They couldn’t agree
item.description: A simple question about Trump’s Iran war goals produced four different answers from Grok, Claude, Gemini, and ChatGPT. On Monday, March 30, Secretary of State Marco Rubio told Good Morning America’s George Stephanopoulos that the U.S. objectives in the Iran war are exactly the same as those laid out by President Donald Trump on February 28, when the U.S. and Israel launched airstrikes across the country. The consistency of the objectives over the past month of fighting is a sensitive issue; the White House doesn’t want to appear to have whittled down its strategic goals so that it can depart t...

item.title: Ive tracked TV prices for years — last chance to score Amazon Spring Sale TV deals from Hisense and TCL
item.description: Amazon Big Spring Sale TV deals go past its own Fire TVs. Now that 2026 TVs are out, Amazon is putting top 2025 QLED TVs on sale.

item.title: Im a tech editor. I found 45+ tech deals Id actually buy in Amazons Spring Sale.
item.description: I'm a tech editor, and I found the top tech deals from Amazon's Big Spring Sale. Grab Sony headphones for $48, Kindles for $94, and $250 off MacBooks.

item.title: The best AirPods deals in the Amazon Big Spring Sale — we found AirPods Pro 3 for under $200
item.description: We found the best AirPods deals to shop during Amazon's Big Spring Sale. Save $60 on AirPods Pro 3.

item.title: The best Apple Watch deals in Amazons Big Spring Sale — we found deals starting at just $189
item.description: Check out the best Apple Watch deals to shop during Amazon's 2026 Big Spring Sale. Save $60 on the Apple Watch SE 2 while it's 24% off.

item.title: I test laptops for a living — these are the best MacBook deals in Amazons Big Spring Sale
item.description: We found the best MacBook deals at Amazon during the Big Spring Sale. Get a MacBook Neo for $689 and M4 MacBook Airs for $949, saving $250.

item.title: The best Apple deals in the Amazon Spring Sale — we found new lows on AirPods, iPads, and MacBooks
item.description: See all the best Apple deals from the Amazon Big Spring Sale, including $50 off AirPods Pro 3 and $250 off M4 MacBook Air laptops.

item.title: Amazons Spring Sale is still live: We found 100+ deals on Apple, Kindle, Bose, and Sony
item.description: Amazon's Big Spring Sale runs until March 31. Take $100 off Apple Watch Series 11, 60% off Shark robot vacuums, and Kindles for $95.

item.title: Buy the Pokémon TCG Perfect Order Booster Display Box for as low as $210.90 — save at Amazon and Walmart
item.description: Amazon has the Pokémon TCG Perfect Order Booster Box at $224.95, while Walmart undercuts it at $210.90, or about $5.86 per pack.

item.title: The Jackery Explorer 2000 v2 portable power station is half off in Amazon’s Spring Sale — save over $700
item.description: Find the best power station deal on Amazon. Save 50% on the Jackery Explorer 2000 v2 at Amazon.

item.title: The DJI Mini 3 Fly More Combo is down to its lowest-ever price in Amazon’s Big Spring Sale — save over $200
item.description: Find the best DJI drone deal. Save 31% on the DJI Mini 3 Fly More Combo at Amazon.

item.title: The Dyson Airwrap i.d. just got a $150 discount in Amazons Big Spring Sale — buy before the sale ends
item.description: Get the best Dyson Airwrap deal. Save 23% on the Dyson Airwrap Origin at Amazon.

item.title: The Roborock Qrevo Series robot vacuum is under $400 in Amazons Big Spring Sale — save $250
item.description: Find the best robot vacuum deal at Amazon. Save 38% on the roborock Qrevo Series at Amazon.

item.title: We didnt grow up on social media. We grew up on digital nicotine.
item.description: Activist Lennon Torres reacts to a landmark ruling against social media giants like Meta.

item.title: Pay $43 for Visual Studio 2026 and skip the usual price tag
item.description: Save on Microsoft Visual Studio Professional 2026 for $42.97 (reg. $499.99) and get a full IDE with AI-assisted coding, debugging tools, and cross-platform support.

item.title: This 100TB cloud storage sale could change everything
item.description: Secure 100TB of lifetime cloud storage with Internxt for $974.97 — private, encrypted, and ending soon.

item.title: How to watch Mexico vs. Belgium online for free
item.description: How to watch live football for free. Live stream Mexico vs. Belgium in a 2026 International Friendly for free.

item.title: Learn stock, forex, and futures trading with this $40 course bundle
item.description: This 2026 trading course bundle includes 89 hours of instruction on stocks, forex, and futures, now $39.99 (reg. $140) for lifetime access.

item.description: How to watch live football for free. Live stream England vs. Japan in a 2026 International Friendly for free.

item.description: How to watch World Cup qualifiers for free. Live stream Sweden vs. Poland in World Cup 2026 qualifiers for free.

item.description: How to watch live football for free. Live stream Scotland vs. Ivory Coast in a 2026 International Friendly for free.

item.title: Derrière la Lune, la Terre se lèvera pour Artemis II… Personne n’a vu ça depuis 50 ans
item.description: Techniquement, tous les voyants sont au vert pour le lanceur SLS et le véhicule Orion de la mission Artemis II. Si les conditions météorologiques sont favorables, la Nasa devrait autoriser son lancement dans la nuit de mercredi à jeudi pour une mission de dix jours à destination de la...

item.title: The best coffee machine deals in Amazons Big Spring Sale — last chance to save on Breville and Keurig
item.description: The best deals on coffee machines from the Amazon Big Spring Sale 2026 — get up to $200 off Breville and Keurig.

item.title: NYT Mini crossword answers, hints for March 31, 2026
item.description: Answers to each clue for the March 31, 2026 edition of NYT's The Mini crossword puzzle.
